description: Create D:\\jarvis runtime folders and SQLite state
name: init

description: Create a consistent SQLite runtime backup
name: backup

description: Show local model catalog and dispatcher config
name: models

description: Show dispatcher docker compose commands and env
name: dispatcher-compose

description: Run a typed action.v1 request through the native host bridge
name: host-bridge-action

description: Update persona fields, e.g. --set location=Kazan --set tech_stack=Proxmox,Debian
name: persona-set

description: Copy and index a local text file
name: ingest

description: Execute an approved HITL gate through the gated executor
name: approval-execute

description: Auto-chain mission steps until completion, a blocked step, or the budget
name: mission-run
